events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flanged joints in progress, wrong gasket type/material for service. This is a sequence/procedure violation - wrong gasket installed. Work must stop, gasket must be replaced with correct one before continuing. Decision: fail. Risk: high (wrong gasket for service could leak/fail). Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant.
